title: Ship v8.2 Adoption Feedback And Operator Validation Loop
description: Implement governed operator validation feedback records, audit gates, Mission Control projection, release-state integration, and self-hosting evidence so AOF can distinguish internally green work from operator-understood, reproducible, accepted, rejected, or clarification-needed work.
triage_notes: Completed v8.2 operator validation governance implementation, audit gate, Mission Control projection, self-hosting evidence, and focused regression tests.
